name: Cosmo Poly
explanation: A lush eight-voice analog poly synthesizer with a cinematic ring-modulated character. Each voice layers a saw and a pulse oscillator plus a sub-octave into a smooth resonant low-pass shaped by its own filter envelope, then an amplitude envelope; chords ring with independent contours across a wide stereo field. A built-in ring modulator multiplies each voice against a detuned carrier to add clangy, inharmonic metallic shimmer, while Brilliance tilts the top end open for a glassy string-pad sheen. Controls: Cutoff, Resonance, Env Amount, Ring, Brilliance, Attack, Release and Level.
